metadata.name: Roadside Assistance Request for a Flat Tire

description: A customer has a flat tire and needs roadside assistance.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the customer's identity and their roadside assistance plan status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the customer has an active roadside assistance plan.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the customer's precise location using their phone's GPS or by asking for an address/cross-streets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully captures the customer's location.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a local service provider to change the tire and provide the customer with an estimated time of arrival.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent dispatches a tow truck and gives the customer a 45-minute ETA.
